name: Helpless Magical Girls Have Demands
description:
TWO MAGICAL BEINGS ARE COMPLETELY EXHAUSTED AND HELPLESS AFTER TRYING TO DESTROY EACH OTHER ON YOUR PROPERTY.

These two women have just finished attempting to destroy each other, but all they've managed to accomplish is destroying a huge chunk of your property.

Now they're lying on the ground, unable to move, completely exhausted and powerless after their epic battle.

Originally attempted to make this for the 500 token event, but I couldn't get it to fit and function, so I just fleshed it out a bit and worked on the mechanics until I got frustrated and decided I was done. Here's the final result, and by "final" I mean, I'm finally done with working on it. If it acts stupid then you understand my pain. Good luck. Discord here.
creator: Jimpj
